arts.ttl: Preview: Strasbourg vs. Brest - prediction, team news, lineups

arts.ttl: ‘English coaches aren’t exposed to the Premier League’ – Liam Rosenior on the lack of opportunities for British coaches
arts.sum: In an interview with BBC Sport, RC Strasbourg head coach Liam Rosenior was asked about his unorthodox move to France and the difficulty younger British coaches have at being able to access…
